chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4261 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : "إِنَّ مِنْ حَقِّ اَلضَّيْفِ أَنْ يُعَدَّ لَهُ اَلْخِلاَلُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4261 - And in another narration: "Indeed, it is from the rights of the guest that a toothpick is prepared for him."
